user_bio:
AI Automation Architect & Founder of AiXCEL Solutions.
I build production-grade n8n workflows for B2B clients in marketing, SaaS, healthcare & real estate. From AI-powered pipelines with Claude & Gemini to CRM automation, voice AI, and multi-platform onboarding systems, I turn complex ops into clean, reliable automations.
1500+ live workflows. Real problems. No fluff.
